mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record ( order_id, payment_no, payment_channel, amount, payment_status ) VALUES ( #{payment.orderId}, #{payment.paymentNo}, #{payment.paymentChannel}, #{payment.amount}, #{payment.paymentStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_record WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET payment_status = 'PENDING', updated_at = NOW() WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
UPDATE payment_record SET payment_status = 'SUCCESS', transaction_no = #{transactionNo}, paid_at = NOW(), callback_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET payment_status = 'PAID', order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT', paid_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
UPDATE trade_order SET order_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND payment_status = 'UNPAID'

UPDATE artwork a INNER JOIN trade_order_item oi ON oi.artwork_id = a.id SET a.inventory_available = a.inventory_available + 1, a.status = CASE WHEN a.inventory_available + 1 > 0 THEN 'PUBLISHED' ELSE a.status END, a.updated_at = NOW() WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment_order ( order_id, shipment_no, shipment_type, shipment_status ) SELECT #{orderId}, CONCAT('S', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), #{orderId}), 'ARTWORK', 'TO_BE_SHIPPED' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} )
